categories.title: Recent Updates and Issues in ElizaOS

content.text: A user inquired about enabling image posting for a Twitter agent using client-twitter. They sought guidance on how to allow their bot, Eliza, to tweet images along with text.

A new test coverage setup was introduced for the plugin-browser package. The update includes tests for AWS S3 integration, video processing, web scraping, PDF handling, plugin integration, and TypeScript type validation. These tests aim to ensure reliable cloud storage, media handling, and web content processing.

A fix was implemented to address an issue with Telegram negative chat IDs. Previously, negative chat IDs caused UUID conversion failures, leading to world creation errors. The update ensures that negative IDs are properly handled while maintaining uniqueness.

An error was reported regarding a missing Anthropic API key, causing failures in AI-related functionalities. Additionally, an OpenAI API error (401 - Unauthorized) was logged, indicating authentication issues. The error logs suggest that the API key needs to be passed via the 'apiKey' parameter or the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.
With four contributors, no pull requests were merged, but various improvements were made across the project.
